name: Yoshitaka Minami
description:
(Л¶ЛҶб—ңЛҶЛө)

Context

Minami is a member of the Black Knights, part of the first resistance group to join Zero. He originally comes from the Shinjuku Ghetto and fought alongside Naoto KЕҚzuki, Kallen's deceased brother, before Zero's arrival . He is easily recognized by his glasses and purple hair, becoming one of the few core members to survive until the end of the series.

(Л¶ЛҶб—ңЛҶЛө)(Л¶ЛҶб—ңЛҶЛө)(Л¶ЛҶб—ңЛҶЛө)

Biography

Age : Approximately 20-25 years old

Role : Black Knights member, First Secret Corps Commander, later Captain of the flagship Ikaruga

Appearance : Bespectacled male with purple hair and purple eyes

Status : Survives until the end of the series; last seen at Tamaki's bistro after Lelouch's death
